title: In-place field type change — breaks old application code reading the field
expected_feedback: Standard: In-place type change from string to double means old application code expecting strings will break immediately when encountering already-migrated documents. During rolling deployment, some app instances read old type while others read new type — causing intermittent failures. Use the new-field pattern: add amount_v2 as double, dual-read in application (prefer amount_v2, fallback to amount), then cleanup old field in a separate release.
violated_rule: Field type changes use new-field + dual-read pattern
